children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), the term “debt instrument” means a bond, debenture, note, or certificate or other evidence of indebtedness.

children.heading: Exception for certain annuity contracts
children.label: B Exception for certain annuity contracts
i
children.text: depends (in whole or in substantial part) on the life expectancy of 1 or more individuals, or

children.label: I
children.text: in a transaction in which there is no consideration other than cash or another annuity contract meeting the requirements of this clause,

children.label: II
children.text: pursuant to the exercise of an election under an insurance contract by a beneficiary thereof on the death of the insured party under such contract, or

children.label: III
children.text: in a transaction involving a qualified pension or employee benefit plan.

children.heading: Publicly offered debt instruments
children.label: A Publicly offered debt instruments
children.text: In the case of any debt instrument which is publicly offered, the term “date of original issue” means the date on which the issue was first issued to the public.

children.heading: Issues not publicly offered and not issued for property
children.label: B Issues not publicly offered and not issued for property
children.text: In the case of any debt instrument to which section 1273(b)(2) applies, the term “date of original issue” means the date on which the debt instrument was sold by the issuer.

children.heading: Other debt instruments
children.label: C Other debt instruments
children.text: In the case of any debt instrument not described in subparagraph (A) or (B), the term “date of original issue” means the date on which the debt instrument was issued in a sale or exchange.

children.label: A
children.text: the interest on such obligation is not includible in gross income under section 103, or

children.label: B
children.text: the interest on such obligation is exempt from tax (without regard to the identity of the holder) under any other provision of law.

children.heading: Treatment of obligations distributed by corporations
children.label: 4 Treatment of obligations distributed by corporations
children.text: Any debt obligation of a corporation distributed by such corporation with respect to its stock shall be treated as if it had been issued by such corporation for property.

children.heading: Treatment of borrower in the case of certain loans for personal use
children.label: b Treatment of borrower in the case of certain loans for personal use

children.heading: Sections 1274 and 483 not to apply
children.label: 1 Sections 1274 and 483 not to apply
children.text: In the case of the obligor under any debt instrument given in consideration for the sale or exchange of property, sections 1274 and 483 shall not apply if such property is personal use property.

children.heading: Original issue discount deducted on cash basis in certain cases
children.label: 2 Original issue discount deducted on cash basis in certain cases
i
children.text: is incurred in connection with the acquisition or carrying of personal use property, and

children.label: ii
children.text: has original issue discount (determined after the application of paragraph (1)), and

children.label: B
children.text: the obligor under such instrument uses the cash receipts and disbursements method of accounting,

children.heading: Personal use property
children.label: 3 Personal use property
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “personal use property” means any property substantially all of the use of which by the taxpayer is not in connection with a trade or business of the taxpayer or an activity described in section 212. The determination of whether property is described in the preceding sentence shall be made as of the time of issuance of the debt instrument.

children.heading: Information required to be set forth on instrument
children.label: 1 Information required to be set forth on instrument
i
children.text: the amount of the original issue discount, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the issue date,

children.heading: Special rule for instruments not publicly offered
children.label: B Special rule for instruments not publicly offered
children.text: In the case of any issue of debt instruments not publicly offered, the regulations prescribed under subparagraph (A) shall not require the information to be set forth on the debt instrument before any disposition of such instrument by the first buyer.

children.heading: Information required to be submitted to Secretary
children.label: 2 Information required to be submitted to Secretary
A
children.text: The amount of the original issue discount.

children.label: B
children.text: The issue date.

children.label: C
children.text: Such other information with respect to the issue as the Secretary may by regulations require.

children.heading: Exceptions
children.label: 3 Exceptions
children.text: This subsection shall not apply to any obligation referred to in section 1272(a)(2) (relating to exceptions from current inclusion of original issue discount).

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: 4 Cross reference
children.text: For civil penalty for failure to meet requirements of this subsection, see section 6706.

children.heading: Regulation authority
children.label: d Regulation authority
children.text: The Secretary may prescribe regulations providing that where, by reason of varying rates of interest, put or call options, indefinite maturities, contingent payments, assumptions of debt instruments, or other circumstances, the tax treatment under this subpart (or section 163(e)) does not carry out the purposes of this subpart (or section 163(e)), such treatment shall be modified to the extent appropriate to carry out the purposes of this subpart (or section 163(e)).
